score_range_label.zh: 中等确信度 (50-69) — 本系列新高

position_advice.en: 58% (Raised from 55% — earnings engine firing, liquidity worst behind us)
position_advice.zh: 58%（从 55% 上调——盈利引擎发力，流动性最坏已过）

condition.en: Tightening but Decelerating, Inflection in 3-4 Weeks
condition.zh: 紧缩但减速，拐点 3-4 周内

summary.en: The acute phase of the tax-season liquidity drain is definitively over. TGA growth decelerated sharply from +$227B to +$82.7B — the seasonal peak is almost certainly in. Repo lending collapsed from $10.5B to $4M, confirming acute funding stress has fully resolved. SOFR stable at 3.67%. The structural headwind ($388B three-week drain) has not reversed, but the path to TGA unwind is clear. New variable: Warsh (incoming Fed Chair, 5/15) plans significant balance sheet reduction — this is the biggest medium-term risk. If implemented, it removes the Fed BS expansion as the one remaining positive liquidity factor. Inflection point is now 3-4 weeks away.
summary.zh: 税季流动性抽水的急性阶段已明确结束。TGA 增速从 +2270 亿美元骤降至 +827 亿美元——季节性顶部几乎可以确认。Repo 借贷从 105 亿美元崩溃至 400 万美元，确认急性融资压力已完全解除。SOFR 稳定在 3.67%。结构性逆风（三周 3880 亿美元抽水）尚未逆转，但 TGA 回落路径清晰。新变量：Warsh（5/15 上任的美联储主席）计划大幅缩表——这是最大的中期风险。如果实施，将消除美联储资产负债表扩张这一唯一剩余的正面流动性因素。拐点现在距离 3-4 周。

fed_balance_sheet_change.en: +$1.7B (WoW) — nearly flat; Warsh plans significant QT from 5/15
fed_balance_sheet_change.zh: +17 亿美元（周环比）——接近持平；Warsh 计划 5/15 起大幅缩表

rrp_note.en: Effectively zero — no liquidity buffer remaining
rrp_note.zh: 实际归零——无流动性缓冲

tga_note.en: +$82.7B WoW — growth rate slowed sharply from +$227B; peak signal confirmed; seasonal unwind expected in 3-4 weeks
tga_note.zh: 周环比 +827 亿美元——增速从 +2270 亿美元骤降；见顶信号明确；预计 3-4 周内季节性回落

net_liquidity_change.en: -$82B (WoW) / -$388B (3-week) — drain decelerating significantly; repo lending at $4M confirms acute stress resolved
net_liquidity_change.zh: -820 亿美元（周环比）/ -3880 亿美元（三周）——抽水显著减速；Repo 借贷 400 万美元确认急性压力解除

details.en: This week is the Hyperscaler Blitz — the most important single week of 2026. Five major catalysts: FOMC (Tuesday), Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta earnings (Tuesday), Apple/Amazon earnings (Wednesday), Q1 GDP (Wednesday), Nonfarm Payrolls (Friday). The liquidity backdrop is improving: TGA deceleration confirmed, repo stress resolved, SOFR stable. The key risk is Warsh's QT plan — NYT/WSJ/Barrons/Reuters all confirm he plans significant balance sheet reduction from 5/15. If Fed shifts from flat to actively shrinking, the medium-term liquidity outlook deteriorates. Short-term TGA unwind ($200-300B back to system by mid-May) is the near-term positive catalyst.
details.zh: 本周是 Hyperscaler Blitz——2026 年最重要的单周。五个重大催化剂：FOMC（周二）、Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta 财报（周二）、Apple/Amazon 财报（周三）、Q1 GDP（周三）、非农（周五）。流动性背景在改善：TGA 减速确认，repo 压力解除，SOFR 稳定。关键风险是 Warsh 的缩表计划——NYT/WSJ/Barrons/Reuters 全部确认他计划从 5/15 起大幅缩表。如果美联储从持平转向主动缩表，中期流动性前景恶化。短期 TGA 回落（5 月中旬前向系统补充 2000-3000 亿美元）是近期正面催化剂。

status.en: Tightening, Decelerating — Warsh QT is Biggest Medium-Term Risk
status.zh: 紧缩但减速——Warsh 缩表是最大中期风险

reason.en: Score holds at 48. TGA growth rate halved (+$82.7B vs +$227B), repo lending zeroed out ($4M), SOFR stable at 3.67%. The acute phase is definitively over. But Warsh (5/15) plans significant balance sheet reduction — NYT/WSJ/Barrons/Reuters all confirm. If implemented, this removes the Fed BS expansion as the one remaining positive liquidity factor and creates a new medium-term headwind. Score stays at 48 — not improving further until: (1) TGA confirmed peak + begins unwind, (2) Warsh policy direction clarified post-5/15. This week's FOMC (Tuesday) and H.4.1 data are critical.
reason.zh: 分数维持 48。TGA 增速减半（+827 亿美元 vs +2270 亿美元），repo lending 归零（400 万美元），SOFR 稳定在 3.67%。急性阶段已明确结束。但 Warsh（5/15）计划大幅缩表——NYT/WSJ/Barrons/Reuters 全部确认。如果实施，将消除美联储资产负债表扩张这一唯一剩余正面流动性因素，创造新的中期逆风。分数维持 48——在以下条件满足前不会进一步改善：(1) TGA 确认见顶并开始回落，(2) Warsh 5/15 后政策方向明确。本周 FOMC（周二）和 H.4.1 数据至关重要。

status.en: Strong — Q1 +26.1% YoY, AI Hardware Validated, NTM Growth 20%
status.zh: 强劲——Q1 同比 +26.1%，AI 硬件验证，NTM 增长 20%

reason.en: Score improved from 70 to 72. Q1 earnings growth now tracking +26.1% YoY — the strongest quarter in years. 88% beat rate, average beat magnitude +13%, NTM EPS revised up, full-year growth consensus at 20%. Intel's best single day since 1987 (+23.65%), AMD +13.91% — AI hardware demand definitively validated. Credit spreads (HY OAS ~285bps) at 25-year lows confirm no credit stress. But Q2 forward guidance is mixed: 11 negative vs 9 positive pre-announcements. Beat-and-drop continues outside semiconductors. This week's Hyperscaler Blitz (Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta Tuesday, Apple/Amazon Wednesday) is the decisive test. If Mag 5 beats and rallies, score goes to 80+. If beat-and-drop spreads to Mag 5, score falls to 55.
reason.zh: 分数从 70 升至 72。Q1 盈利增长追踪 +26.1% 同比——多年来最强劲的季度。88% beat rate，平均超幅 +13%，NTM EPS 上修，全年增长共识 20%。Intel 创 1987 年以来最佳单日（+23.65%），AMD +13.91%——AI 硬件需求得到明确验证。信用利差（HY OAS 约 285bps）处于 25 年低点，确认无信用压力。但 Q2 前瞻指引分化：11 个负面 vs 9 个正面预告。Beat and drop 在半导体以外持续。本周 Hyperscaler Blitz（Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta 周二，Apple/Amazon 周三）是决定性测试。如果 Mag 5 beat 且上涨，分数升至 80+。如果 beat and drop 扩散到 Mag 5，分数降至 55。

status.zh: 回升至 60% 门槛——边缘改善

reason.en: Score improved from 40 to 48 — breadth showing marginal recovery. Approximately 60% of stocks above their 200DMA, just touching the threshold. But the 50-day moving average of breadth is 54.91% and declining — the trend is still down. Three major sectors with negative YTD returns (Consumer Discretionary -0.13%, Healthcare -0.81%, Financials -3.45%). Dow Jones lagging S&P/Nasdaq — non-confirmation. Russell 2000 barely participating. Score at 48 — marginal improvement but not yet confirmed. Need breadth to hold above 60% for multiple sessions and 50-day MA to turn up before upgrading further.
reason.zh: 分数从 40 升至 48——广度显示边缘改善。约 60% 的股票在 200 日均线上方，刚触门槛。但广度的 50 日移动平均值为 54.91% 且在下降——趋势仍向下。三个主要板块 YTD 负收益（消费周期 -0.13%，医疗 -0.81%，金融 -3.45%）。道琼斯落后 S&P/Nasdaq——不确认。Russell 2000 几乎不参与。分数 48——边缘改善，但尚未确认。需要广度在 60% 以上维持多个交易日，50 日均线开始上升，才能进一步上调。

status.en: Strong — Dual New Highs, VIX Plunging, Credit at 25-Year Lows
status.zh: 强势——双创新高，VIX 大跌，信用 25 年低点

reason.en: Score improved from 72 to 74. S&P 500 at 7,173.91 all-time high (+0.12%), Nasdaq at 24,887.10 all-time high (+0.20%). Monday pre-market futures: S&P +0.15%, Nasdaq +0.17%, Russell 2000 +0.24% — positive open expected. VIX 18.02 (-3.69%) — declining sharply. Yield curve: 10Y 4.336%, 5Y 3.947%, 30Y 4.942%, 2s10s +40bps (normalizing). Oil retreating: WTI $96.74, Brent $101.95 (still elevated but off highs). Gold $4,709.20 (+0.33%). HY OAS ~285bps at 25-year lows. Score at 74 — strong. Not higher because VIX 18.02 at all-time highs is still a divergence, Dow -0.13% lagging, BTC -2.57% diverging, 30Y approaching 5%.
reason.zh: 分数从 72 升至 74。S&P 500 历史新高 7,173.91（+0.12%），Nasdaq 历史新高 24,887.10（+0.20%）。周一盘前期货：S&P +0.15%，Nasdaq +0.17%，Russell 2000 +0.24%——预期正面开盘。VIX 18.02（-3.69%）——大幅下降。收益率曲线：10Y 4.336%，5Y 3.947%，30Y 4.942%，2s10s +40bps（正常化）。油价回落：WTI $96.74，Brent $101.95（仍高位但离高点回落）。黄金 $4,709.20（+0.33%）。HY OAS 约 285bps 处于 25 年低点。分数 74——强劲。未更高，因为历史新高时 VIX 18.02 仍是背离，道指 -0.13% 落后，BTC -2.57% 背离，30Y 接近 5%。

trading_summary.en:
57.9 — Moderate, series high. Earnings are the engine: Q1 +26.1% YoY, 88% beat rate, semis validate AI demand. Liquidity's worst is behind us — TGA decelerating, repo lending zeroed out. VIX plunging, credit at 25-year lows. S&P/Nasdaq dual new highs.

But this week is 2026's watershed — five major catalysts in one week. FOMC Tuesday. Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta Tuesday. Apple/Amazon Wednesday. Q1 GDP Wednesday. Nonfarm Payrolls Friday. 180 S&P 500 companies reporting.

If Hyperscalers all beat and rally: conviction rises to 65+, position to 70%. If multiple beat-and-drops: conviction drops to 45, cut to 40%. If mixed: stay at 58%.

58% position, wait for results. This week answers the question.
trading_summary.zh:
57.9 分，Moderate 新高。盈利是发动机——Q1 +26.1%，88% beat rate，半导体验证 AI 需求。流动性最坏已过——TGA 减速，repo lending 归零。VIX 大跌，信用处于 25 年低点。S&P/Nasdaq 双创新高。

但本周是 2026 年分水岭——五个重大催化剂在同一周。FOMC 周二。Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta 周二。Apple/Amazon 周三。Q1 GDP 周三。非农周五。180 家 S&P 500 公司报告。

如果 Hyperscalers 全部 beat 且上涨：确信度升至 65+，加仓到 70%。如果多个 beat and drop：确信度降至 45，减仓到 40%。如果混合：维持 58%。

58% 仓位，等结果。本周给出答案。

trading_quote: Five catalysts in one week. FOMC. Alphabet. Microsoft. Meta. Apple. Amazon. GDP. Payrolls. This week is 2026's watershed — the market will tell us if this rally has legs or if it's a top.

note.en: All-time high; Monday futures +0.15% — positive open
note.zh: 历史新高；周一期货 +0.15%——正面开盘

note.en: All-time high; Monday futures +0.17% — concentration extreme
note.zh: 历史新高；周一期货 +0.17%——集中度极端

note.en: Lagging — did NOT confirm S&P/Nasdaq new highs; futures -0.02%
note.zh: 落后——未确认 S&P/Nasdaq 新高；期货 -0.02%
小盘股几乎不参与；期货 +0.24%

note.en: Mid-curve stable; FOMC Tuesday is key
note.zh: 中端曲线稳定；FOMC 周二是关键

note.en: Dollar stabilizing — political risk premium removed after DOJ dropped Powell probe
note.zh: 美元企稳——DOJ 撤销 Powell 调查后政治风险溢价消除

note.en: Recovering from pullback; structural bull intact; Silver $75.97 (+1.27%)
note.zh: 从回调中回升；结构性看涨完整；白银 $75.97（+1.27%）

note.en: Elevated — Hormuz risk premium; inflation pressure persists
note.zh: 高位——Hormuz 风险溢价；通胀压力持续

note.en: Above $100 — compressing margins, limiting rate cut space
note.zh: 突破 $100——压缩利润率，限制降息空间

note.en: Diverging from equity new highs — risk-off signal within risk assets
note.zh: 与股市新高背离——风险资产内部风险规避信号

note.en: Declining sharply — but 18 at all-time highs is still a divergence warning
note.zh: 大幅下降——但历史新高时 18 仍是背离警告

exchange_flow_detail.en: 52-week range: $60,074 – $126,198 | Diverging from equity new highs — watch for resolution
exchange_flow_detail.zh: 52 周区间：$60,074 – $126,198 | 与股市新高背离——关注解决方向

analysis.en: BTC -2.57% to $77,302 while S&P/Nasdaq made new all-time highs — a notable risk-off divergence within risk assets. This is a warning signal. Fear & Greed Index at 52 (neutral). Key support at $75,000-$77,000 is being tested. If Hyperscaler Blitz this week delivers beat-and-rally, BTC should recover toward $82,000-$85,000. If beat-and-drop spreads to Mag 5, BTC could break $75,000 and retest $70,000-$72,000. The divergence between BTC and equity new highs is the most important near-term signal to watch.
analysis.zh: BTC -2.57% 至 $77,302，而 S&P/Nasdaq 创历史新高——风险资产内部值得注意的风险规避背离。这是一个警告信号。恐惧贪婪指数 52（中性）。$75,000-$77,000 关键支撑位正在被测试。如果本周 Hyperscaler Blitz 实现 beat and rally，BTC 应回升至 $82,000-$85,000。如果 beat and drop 扩散到 Mag 5，BTC 可能跌破 $75,000 并重测 $70,000-$72,000。BTC 与股市新高之间的背离是近期最重要的观察信号。

gold_silver_note.en: Recovering from pullback; Silver $75.97 (+1.27%); structural bull intact; central bank buying continues
gold_silver_note.zh: 从回调中回升；白银 $75.97（+1.27%）；结构性看涨完整；央行持续购买

key_driver.en: Central bank diversification away from USD + dollar credibility concerns + geopolitical risk premium (Hormuz, Middle East) + inflation hedge (WTI $96.74, Brent $101.95). Gold's structural bull case remains intact despite short-term volatility. The pullback from ATH was healthy — gold is consolidating before the next leg higher. Key levels: support $4,600-$4,650, resistance $4,850-$4,900.
key_driver.zh: 央行从美元多元化 + 美元信誉担忧 + 地缘政治风险溢价（Hormuz、中东）+ 通胀对冲（WTI $96.74，Brent $101.95）。尽管短期波动，黄金的结构性看涨逻辑完整。从历史新高的回调是健康的——黄金在下一波上涨前整固。关键位：支撑 $4,600-$4,650，阻力 $4,850-$4,900。

description.en: 180 S&P 500 companies report this week including the five largest: Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta (Tuesday), Apple/Amazon (Wednesday). These five companies represent 25% of S&P 500 market cap. Morningstar notes 'cheap options suggest big post-earnings swings.' If multiple beat-and-drops occur, the rally narrative collapses. If all beat and rally, conviction rises to 65+.
description.zh: 本周 180 家 S&P 500 公司报告，包括五大巨头：Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta（周二），Apple/Amazon（周三）。这五家公司占 S&P 500 市值的 25%。Morningstar 指出「廉价期权暗示财报后大幅波动」。如果多个 beat and drop 发生，反弹叙事崩溃。如果全部 beat 且上涨，确信度升至 65+。

title.en: Warsh QT + 30Y Approaching 5% — Double Liquidity Hit
title.zh: Warsh 缩表 + 30Y 接近 5%——双重流动性打击

description.en: Warsh (5/15 incoming Fed Chair) plans significant balance sheet reduction — confirmed by NYT/WSJ/Barrons/Reuters. 30Y Treasury yield at 4.942%, approaching the critical 5% level. If the Fed shifts from flat/expanding to actively shrinking the balance sheet AND 30Y breaks 5%, this is a double liquidity headwind that could derail the rally. The TGA unwind (positive) may be offset by Warsh QT (negative).
description.zh: Warsh（5/15 上任的美联储主席）计划大幅缩表——NYT/WSJ/Barrons/Reuters 全部确认。30Y 国债收益率 4.942%，接近关键 5% 水平。如果美联储从持平/扩张转向主动缩表，且 30Y 突破 5%，这是可能破坏反弹的双重流动性逆风。TGA 回落（正面）可能被 Warsh 缩表（负面）抵消。

title.en: BTC Divergence + Brent Above $100 — Internal Fractures
title.zh: BTC 背离 + Brent 突破 $100——内部裂缝

description.en: BTC -2.57% while S&P/Nasdaq made new all-time highs — a notable divergence within risk assets that historically precedes broader weakness. Brent crude above $100 ($101.95) compresses corporate margins and limits the Fed's ability to cut rates. WTI at $96.74 with Hormuz mining order still in background. Oil above $100 + rising yields + Warsh QT = triple headwind for equities if sustained.
description.zh: BTC -2.57% 而 S&P/Nasdaq 创历史新高——风险资产内部值得注意的背离，历史上往往先于更广泛的走弱。Brent 原油突破 $100（$101.95）压缩企业利润率，限制美联储降息能力。WTI $96.74，Hormuz 布雷令仍在背景中。油价 $100+ + 收益率上升 + Warsh 缩表 = 如果持续，股市面临三重逆风。

description.en: Active divergences: (1) S&P/Nasdaq new highs but Dow -0.13% — non-confirmation; (2) Breadth ~60% just touching threshold but 50-day MA 54.91% and declining; (3) BTC -2.57% vs equity new highs — risk-off within risk assets; (4) VIX 18.02 at all-time highs — elevated fear at market peak; (5) 30Y Treasury 4.942% approaching 5% while stocks at highs.
description.zh: 活跃背离：(1) S&P/Nasdaq 新高但道指 -0.13%——不确认；(2) 广度约 60% 刚触门槛但 50 日均线 54.91% 且在下降；(3) BTC -2.57% vs 股市新高——风险资产内部风险规避；(4) 历史新高时 VIX 18.02——市场顶部时恐惧度偏高；(5) 30Y 国债 4.942% 接近 5% 而股市在高位。
